title: DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER - 211info
text: HAPPY VALLEY PUBLIC LIBRARY DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a drop-in day space to go inside out of the cold to warm up temporarily during the winter season. Provides access to Wi-Fi, computers, and public bathrooms. 13793 SE Sieben Park Way Happy Valley, OR 97015 Eligibility: Varies by site Hours: Monday/Friday/Saturday/Sunday 10am-6pm, Tuesday-Thursday 10am-8pm (503) 783-3456 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 783-3456 Main phone Happy Valley Public Library Main phone (503) 783-3456 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Call ahead or visit website to confirm hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 155 and 156 Services: Extreme Cold Warming Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HAPPY VALLEY PUBLIC LIBRARY
